title: Finite Simpson Rule Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite Simpson-rule bad quadrature value QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact rational single-panel Simpson replay for f(x)=x^3 on [0,2] computes quadrature_value = 4, while a malformed row claims quadrature_value = 7/2, isolating a compact scalar equality conflict for the Farkas route.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional quadrature rows only when they add distinct composite-rule, error-term, adaptive, floating-point, or theorem-reconstruction pressure; keep general quadrature convergence and error bounds in future Lean or numerical-honesty lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode the fixed polynomial, interval, Simpson nodes, weights, sample values, weighted sum, quadrature value, and exact polynomial integral as deterministic rational replay obligations.
Route the false Simpson quadrature value through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the exact value.
Expose the pack through integration-horizon, calculus, real-analysis, numerical-analysis, and learner query surfaces.

Keep general Simpson-rule exactness theorems, composite/adaptive quadrature convergence, error bounds, floating-point quadrature correctness, and numerical-stability claims marked as future Lean or numerical-honesty work until formal routes exist.
